    Description

    MarshalledMap.EMPTY_MAP
    An empty read-only MarshalledMap.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections that return MarshalledMap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.append(String key, Object value)
    Adds an entry to this map.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.append(Map<String,Object> values)
    Appends all the entries in the specified map to this map.
    <T> MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.appendFirst(Predicate<T> test, String key, T... values)
    Adds the first value that matches the specified predicate.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.appendIf(boolean flag, String key, Object value)
    Add if flag is true.
    <T> MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.appendIf(Predicate<T> test, String key, T value)
    Add if predicate matches value.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.appendIfAbsent(String key, Object value)
    Adds a value in this map if the entry does not exist or the current value is null.
    <T> MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.appendIfAbsentIf(Predicate<T> predicate, String key, T value)
    Adds a value in this map if the entry does not exist or the current value is null and the value matches the specified predicate.
    static MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.create()
    Construct an empty map.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.exclude(String... keys)
    Returns a copy of this map without the specified keys.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.filtered()
    Enables filtering based on default values.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.filtered(Predicate<Object> value)
    Enables filtering based on a predicate test.
    static MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.filteredMap()
    Construct an empty filtered map.
    static MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.filteredMap(Object... keyValuePairs)
    Construct a filtered map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.findMap(String... keys)
    Returns the first entry that exists converted to a MarshalledMap.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledList.getMap(int index)
    Shortcut for calling get(index, MarshalledMap.class).
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.getMap(String key)
    Returns the specified entry value converted to a Map.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.getMap(String key, boolean createIfNotExists)
    Same as getMap(String) but creates a new empty MarshalledMap if it doesn't already exist.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.getMap(String key, MarshalledMap defVal)
    Returns the specified entry value converted to a MarshalledMap.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.include(String... keys)
    Returns a copy of this map with only the specified keys.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.inner(Map<String,Object> inner)
    Set an inner map in this map to allow for chained get calls.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.keepAll(String... keys)
    The opposite of removeAll(String...).
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.modifiable()
    Returns a modifiable copy of this map if it's unmodifiable.
    protected MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.newMarshalledMap(MarshallingSession bs)
    Factory hook used by cast(Class) / cast(ClassMeta) when the target map type cannot be instantiated directly (e.g. when the caller asks for the Map interface).
    static MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.of(Object... keyValuePairs)
    Construct a map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
    static MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.of(Map<?,?> values)
    Construct a map initialized with the specified map.
    static MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.ofString(Reader in, Parser p)
    Construct a map initialized by parsing the specified reader with the specified parser.
    static MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.ofString(CharSequence in, Parser p)
    Construct a map initialized by parsing the specified string with the specified parser.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.session(MarshallingSession session)
    Override the default bean session used for converting POJOs.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value)
    Sets the MarshallingSession currently associated with this map.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.unmodifiable()
    Returns an unmodifiable copy of this map if it's modifiable.

    DelegateMap<T extends Map>
    Represents a wrapped Map where entries in the map can be removed without affecting the underlying map.
